cluster_fsm.spec_reference: Matter 1.5 Application Cluster Specification, Section 5.2, Pages 397-476

features.name: PINCredential
features.description: Lock supports PIN credentials (via keypad, or over-the-air)

features.name: FingerCredentials
features.description: Lock supports finger related credentials (fingerprint, finger vein)

features.name: WeekDayAccessSchedules
features.description: Lock supports week day user access schedules

features.name: DoorPositionSensor
features.description: Lock supports a door position sensor that indicates door's state

features.name: FaceCredentials
features.description: Lock supports face related credentials (face, iris, retina)

features.name: CredentialOverTheAirAccess
features.description: PIN codes over-the-air supported for lock/unlock operations

features.name: User
features.description: Lock supports the user commands and database

features.name: YearDayAccessSchedules
features.description: Lock supports year day user access schedules

features.name: Unbolting
features.description: Lock supports unbolting (retract bolt without pulling latch)

features.name: AliroProvisioning
features.description: Lock supports Aliro credential provisioning as defined in [Aliro]

features.name: AliroBLEUWB
features.description: Lock supports the Bluetooth LE + UWB Access Control Flow as defined in [Aliro]

states.name: Locked_Normal
states.description: Door lock is fully locked in Normal operating mode - standard secure state
states.safety_implications: Physical entry denied - secure state, expected behavior

states.name: Unlocked_Normal
states.description: Door lock is unlocked in Normal operating mode - door can be opened
states.safety_implications: Physical entry permitted - security risk if unauthorized

states.name: Unlatched_Normal
states.description: Door lock is unlatched (bolt retracted AND latch pulled) in Normal mode
states.safety_implications: Door is fully open - maximum entry opportunity

states.name: NotFullyLocked_Normal
states.description: Lock mechanism is not fully engaged (partial lock) in Normal mode
states.safety_implications: Partial security - door may be forced open

states.name: Locked_Vacation
states.description: Door lock is locked in Vacation mode - only remote access, keypad disabled
states.safety_implications: Only remote and master user keypad access - good for unoccupied property

states.name: Unlocked_Vacation
states.description: Door lock is unlocked in Vacation mode
states.safety_implications: Unexpected state - vacation mode typically secured

states.name: Locked_Privacy
states.description: Door lock is locked in Privacy mode - ALL external interfaces disabled
states.safety_implications: Maximum privacy - no external control, manual unlock changes to Normal mode

states.name: Locked_NoRemoteLockUnlock
states.description: Door lock is locked with remote control disabled - keypad and RFID work
states.safety_implications: Remote attacks mitigated - only local physical access

states.name: Unlocked_NoRemoteLockUnlock
states.description: Door lock is unlocked with remote control disabled
states.safety_implications: Local unlock successful but remote cannot re-lock

states.name: Unlocked_Passage
states.description: Door is unlocked in Passage mode - no credential needed (business hours)
states.safety_implications: Open access - appropriate only during supervised hours

states.name: UserCodeDisabled
states.description: User locked out due to WrongCodeEntryLimit exceeded
states.safety_implications: Brute force protection active - legitimate users may be locked out

states.name: DoorOpen
states.description: Door position sensor indicates door is open
states.safety_implications: Physical entry possible - normal if authorized

states.name: DoorClosed
states.description: Door position sensor indicates door is closed

states.name: DoorForcedOpen
states.description: Door was forced open while locked - ALARM state
states.safety_implications: CRITICAL: Intrusion detected - immediate security response needed

states.name: DoorJammed
states.description: Door position sensor indicates door is jammed
states.safety_implications: CRITICAL: Mechanism failure - may not be securing properly

states.name: AliroConfigured
states.description: Aliro reader configuration is set - BLE/UWB credentials can operate lock
states.safety_implications: BLE-based access enabled - additional attack surface

transitions.guard_condition: OperatingMode IN [Normal, Vacation, NoRemoteLockUnlock] && ActuatorEnabled == true && (!RequirePINForRemoteOperation || (Feature_PIN && PINCode_valid))
actions: generate_event(LockOperation, {LockOperationType: Lock, OperationSource: Remote, UserIndex: user_idx, FabricIndex: fabric_idx, SourceNode: node_id})

error_responses.description: Lock command not allowed in current operating mode (e.g., Privacy mode)
Lock actuator is disabled
PIN required for remote operation but not provided
Invalid PIN provided - increments WrongCodeEntryLimit counter
Remote lock commands not allowed in Privacy mode

transitions.guard_condition: OperatingMode IN [Normal, Vacation, NoRemoteLockUnlock] && ActuatorEnabled == true && (!RequirePINForRemoteOperation || (Feature_PIN && PINCode_valid)) && User.UserStatus != OccupiedDisabled && (User.UserType == UnrestrictedUser || ScheduleAllowsAccess)
actions: generate_event(LockOperation, {LockOperationType: Unlock, OperationSource: Remote, UserIndex: user_idx, FabricIndex: fabric_idx, SourceNode: node_id})
transitions.timing_constraint: Timed Interaction required. If AutoRelockTime supported, auto-relocks after expiry.

error_responses.description: Remote unlock not allowed in Privacy mode
Remote unlock explicitly disabled in this mode
User account is disabled
Invalid PIN - counts toward WrongCodeEntryLimit
User access restricted by schedule - outside allowed time window
Remote unlock commands disabled in NoRemoteLockUnlock mode - device still responds but does not unlock

transitions.guard_condition: OperatingMode IN [Normal, Vacation] && ActuatorEnabled == true && (!RequirePINForRemoteOperation || PINCode_valid)
transitions.timing_constraint: Temporary unlock - auto-relocks after Timeout seconds (overrides AutoRelockTime)

error_responses.description: Remote unlock not allowed in this mode

transitions.guard_condition: Feature_UBOLT == true && OperatingMode IN [Normal, Vacation] && (!RequirePINForRemoteOperation || PINCode_valid)

error_responses.description: Unbolting feature not supported

transitions.timing_constraint: Automatic transition when AutoRelockTime timer expires

error_responses.description: Invalid PIN provided

transitions.timing_constraint: User locked out for UserCodeTemporaryDisableTime seconds

error_responses.description: Too many wrong code entries - user temporarily disabled

actions: generate_event(LockUserChange, {LockDataType: UserIndex, DataOperationType: Add, UserIndex: UserIndex})

error_responses.description: Cannot add user - slot already occupied
UserIndex must be 1 to NumberOfTotalUsersSupported

actions: IF UserName != null && CreatorFabricIndex == accessing_fabric THEN User[UserIndex].UserName := UserName
IF UserUniqueID != null && CreatorFabricIndex == accessing_fabric THEN User[UserIndex].UserUniqueID := UserUniqueID
IF UserStatus != null THEN User[UserIndex].UserStatus := UserStatus
IF UserType != null THEN User[UserIndex].UserType := UserType
IF CredentialRule != null THEN User[UserIndex].CredentialRule := CredentialRule
generate_event(LockUserChange, {LockDataType: UserIndex, DataOperationType: Modify, UserIndex: UserIndex})

error_responses.description: Cannot modify non-existent user
Cannot modify UserName created by another fabric

actions: FOREACH credential OF User[UserIndex]: Clear credential
generate_event(LockUserChange, {LockDataType: UserIndex, DataOperationType: Clear, UserIndex: UserIndex})

error_responses.condition: UserIndex out of valid range and not 0xFFFFE
error_responses.description: Invalid UserIndex

transitions.guard_condition: OperationType == Add && UserIndex == null && CredentialSlot available
actions: Create new User record with provided or default values
generate_event(LockUserChange, {LockDataType: CredentialType, DataOperationType: Add, UserIndex: UserIndex, DataIndex: CredentialIndex})

error_responses.description: No available user slots
Credential data already exists
Credential slot already in use

transitions.guard_condition: OperationType == Add && UserIndex != null && User[UserIndex].CreatorFabricIndex == accessing_fabric
actions: generate_event(LockUserChange, {LockDataType: CredentialType, DataOperationType: Add, UserIndex: UserIndex, DataIndex: CredentialIndex})

error_responses.description: Cannot add credential to user created by another fabric
User has maximum credentials

actions: IF User has no other credentials THEN reset User to default values
generate_event(LockUserChange, {LockDataType: CredentialType, DataOperationType: Clear, DataIndex: CredentialIndex})

error_responses.description: Cannot clear ProgrammingPIN with ClearCredential
Aliro config already set - must ClearAliroReaderConfig first

transitions.timing_constraint: WARNING: Revokes ALL existing Aliro device access

transitions.guard_condition: Feature_WDSCH == true && WeekDayIndex valid && UserIndex valid
transitions.timing_constraint: EndHour >= StartHour required; if equal, EndMinute > StartMinute required

error_responses.description: WeekDayIndex must be 1 to NumberOfWeekDaySchedulesSupportedPerUser

error_responses.condition: EndHour < StartHour OR (EndHour == StartHour && EndMinute <= StartMinute)
error_responses.description: Invalid time range

transitions.guard_condition: Feature_YDSCH == true && YearDayIndex valid && UserIndex valid

error_responses.description: End time must be greater than start time

transitions.timing_constraint: During holiday schedule, specified OperatingMode overrides normal mode

error_responses.description: End time must be greater than start time

transitions.timing_constraint: Privacy mode only settable when door is locked

error_responses.description: Privacy mode requires door to be locked

transitions.timing_constraint: DURESS: Unlocks but triggers silent alarm for emergency services
Single use - user disabled after successful unlock

events.name: DoorLockAlarm

fields.name: AlarmCode
fields.description: Alarm code: LockJammed, LockFactoryReset, LockRadioPowerCycled, WrongCodeEntryLimit, FrontEscutcheonRemoved, DoorForcedOpen, DoorAjar, ForcedUser

events.description: Generated for critical security events requiring immediate attention

events.name: DoorStateChange
events.priority: CRITICAL if not DoorClosed, else INFO

fields.name: DoorState
fields.description: New door state: DoorOpen, DoorClosed, DoorJammed, DoorForcedOpen, DoorUnspecifiedError, DoorAjar

events.description: Generated when door position changes (requires DPS feature)

fields.name: OperationSource
fields.description: Unspecified, Manual, ProprietaryRemote, Keypad, Auto, Button, Schedule, Remote, RFID, Biometric, Aliro

fields.name: FabricIndex
fields.description: Fabric that performed operation - NOT null if Remote

fields.name: SourceNode
fields.description: Node that performed operation - NOT null if Remote

events.name: LockOperationError
events.priority: CRITICAL for DisabledUserDenied or Lock type, else INFO

events.name: LockUserChange

fields.name: LockDataType
fields.description: What changed: Unspecified, ProgrammingCode, UserIndex, WeekDaySchedule, YearDaySchedule, HolidaySchedule, PIN, RFID, Fingerprint, FingerVein, Face, AliroCredentialIssuerKey, AliroEvictableEndpointKey, AliroNonEvictableEndpointKey

fields.name: FabricIndex
fields.description: Fabric that made change - NOT null if Remote

fields.name: SourceNode
fields.description: Node that made change - NOT null if Remote

fields.name: DataIndex
fields.description: Index of specific item changed (nullable, 0xFFFF for all)

events.description: Generated when user, schedule, or credential changes

functions.name: ValidatePINCode
functions.description: Validates provided PIN code against stored credentials. Returns true if PIN matches any enabled user's credential.

functions.name: CheckScheduleAccess
functions.description: Checks if user has schedule-based access at current time. Returns true if user is UnrestrictedUser or current time falls within configured schedules.

functions.name: IncrementWrongCodeCounter
functions.description: Increments wrong code entry counter. If exceeds WrongCodeEntryLimit, triggers UserCodeTemporaryDisableTimer.

safety_critical_elements.safety_concern: Remote unlock grants physical access - could allow unauthorized entry
safety_critical_elements.mitigation_in_spec: RequirePINForRemoteOperation attribute (OPTIONAL), Timed Interaction prevents replay

safety_critical_elements.safety_concern: Configures BLE-based credentials - could allow attacker to add their own access method
safety_critical_elements.mitigation_in_spec: Requires Administer privilege, INVALID_IN_STATE if config exists (prevents overwrite)

safety_critical_elements.safety_concern: Revokes ALL Aliro device access - denial of service for legitimate users
safety_critical_elements.mitigation_in_spec: Specification NOTE: Administrators SHALL NOT clear without explicit user permission
DoorLockAlarm event with CRITICAL priority generated

safety_critical_elements.safety_concern: If FALSE, remote unlock without PIN allows unauthorized access
safety_critical_elements.mitigation_in_spec: Default value not specified, Administer privilege to change

safety_critical_elements.safety_concern: If set too high, brute force attacks become feasible
safety_critical_elements.mitigation_in_spec: Range 1-255, Administer privilege to change, generates DoorLockAlarm when exceeded

safety_critical_elements.safety_concern: Duress situation - user being coerced to unlock
safety_critical_elements.mitigation_in_spec: ForcedUser type triggers silent alarm while granting access

safety_critical_elements.safety_concern: If TRUE, PIN transmitted in commands - potential interception
safety_critical_elements.mitigation_in_spec: Default FALSE, Administer privilege to change

spec_gaps.description: No recommended minimum value for WrongCodeEntryLimit. Range is 1-255.
spec_gaps.security_impact: Value of 255 would allow extensive brute force attempts before lockout

spec_gaps.description: No default value specified. Conformance is 'COTA & PIN' (optional).
spec_gaps.security_impact: Manufacturers may default to FALSE, allowing remote unlock without PIN

spec_gaps.description: Inverted bitmap semantics: bit SET = NOT supported. Different from most Matter bitmaps.
spec_gaps.security_impact: Implementation errors could incorrectly enable/disable modes

spec_gaps.description: Uses 'SHALL NOT' for clearing without user permission, but no enforcement mechanism.
spec_gaps.security_impact: Rogue administrator could revoke all Aliro access without notification

spec_gaps.description: No minimum value specified. Range is 1-255 seconds.
spec_gaps.security_impact: Value of 1 second provides minimal brute force protection

spec_gaps.description: Cluster only defines metadata format for notifications - doesn't describe how to CREATE fingerprint credentials.
spec_gaps.security_impact: Fingerprint enrollment is manufacturer-specific, potentially insecure

spec_gaps.description: Fabric isolation for UserName/UserUniqueID modification, but UserStatus/UserType can be modified by any admin fabric.
spec_gaps.security_impact: One administrator fabric can disable users created by another fabric

spec_gaps.description: No mechanism to prevent re-enabling a used DisposableUser by another fabric with admin access.
spec_gaps.security_impact: DisposableUser could be reset to OccupiedEnabled, defeating single-use intent
